linkedinPhoto.title: AI LinkedIn Photo
linkedinPhoto.subtitle: Upload a selfie, generate a professional LinkedIn headshot
linkedinPhoto.apiKeyHint: API Key is stored locally in your browser, never uploaded to any server.
linkedinPhoto.uploadHint: Drag & drop or click to upload. JPG, PNG (max 5MB)
linkedinPhoto.cameraError: Cannot access camera. Please check permissions.
linkedinPhoto.promptDefault:
Transform this casual selfie into a polished, corporate-grade LinkedIn headshot.

Identity preservation: Maintain the subject's exact facial structure, skin tone, eye color, hair color and style, and all distinguishing features — the result must be unmistakably the same person.

Lighting: Simulate a three-point studio setup — soft key light at 45° camera-left, gentle fill light camera-right, and a subtle rim/hair light to separate the subject from the background. Avoid harsh shadows or blown-out highlights.

Background: Clean, slightly out-of-focus neutral gradient (light grey to soft blue-grey). No distracting elements.

Composition: Tight head-and-shoulders crop, subject centered, eyes at upper-third line. Slight 10-15° body angle toward camera-left with face turned back toward camera for a natural editorial feel.

Attire & grooming: Refine clothing to appear neat and professional. Smooth minor skin blemishes while preserving natural skin texture — do not over-retouch.

Technical quality: Ultra-sharp focus on the eyes, shallow depth of field (f/2.8 equivalent), no chromatic aberration, no noise. Output resolution should match or exceed the input image.

Mood: Confident, approachable, and trustworthy — appropriate for senior professional or executive branding.
linkedinPhoto.requirementsPlaceholder: e.g., dark suit, blue background, smiling...
linkedinPhoto.resultPlaceholder: Your LinkedIn photo will appear here
linkedinPhoto.resultPlaceholderHint: Upload a selfie and click Generate
linkedinPhoto.errorNoApiKey: Bind a usable Gemini vision profile in Settings first
linkedinPhoto.errorInvalidKey: Invalid API Key, please check and try again
linkedinPhoto.errorSafety: Image did not pass content safety review, please try a different photo

jd.title: Job Descriptions & Targeted Resumes
jd.description: Save a text or image job description, use your bound JD / Vision LLM to extract structured requirements, and confirm them before fact matching or targeted resume generation.
jd.pasteDescription: Save the source text first, then use your personal JD LLM profile for structured extraction. Source text and review results are isolated to your account.
jd.titlePlaceholder: For example: Senior Unity Client Engineer
jd.textPlaceholder: Paste responsibilities, required qualifications, and preferred qualifications…
jd.securityNote: JD content is untrusted data; prompts inside it cannot change system instructions.
jd.imageDescription: Upload one PNG, JPEG, or WebP. After server-side validation, JadeAI uses the profile bound to Vision whose capability probe passed. Results always enter human review.
jd.imageLimits: PNG / JPG / JPEG / WebP; up to 10 MiB and 8000px on either dimension.
jd.imageExtracted: Image JD extracted; review the structured result
jd.visionRequired: Configure a profile for the Vision feature and make sure its Vision capability probe passes first.
jd.visionStatusHint: Bind a profile that passes the Vision capability test to the Vision feature in LLM settings.
jd.visionStatusLoadFailed: Vision configuration could not be loaded. Refresh or retry from settings.

errors.visionRequired: Bind and test a model that supports image input first.
errors.profileInvalid: The current Vision profile failed its latest capability test. Fix and retest it, or bind a profile that passed.
errors.authFailed: The provider rejected the current API key. Correct it and retest the profile.
errors.modelNotFound: The provider could not find this ModelName. Correct it and retest the profile.
errors.rateLimited: The Vision provider is rate limited. Retry shortly.
errors.timeout: The Vision request timed out. JadeAI normalizes the image first; retry later or upload a clearer screenshot.
errors.visionUnsupported: The current model rejected image input. Bind a Vision-capable model.
errors.outboundBlocked: The current BaseURL is blocked by the outbound network policy. Check the LLM endpoint.
errors.invalidResponse: The model response could not be converted into a valid JD structure. Retry or use a more reliable Vision model.
errors.providerError: The Vision provider rejected or failed the request. Use the request ID to inspect service logs and retest the profile.

jd.imagePrivacyNote: This phase does not retain the original image binary. It stores only file metadata, the original hash, extracted text, and reviewable requirements.
jd.imageHistoryDescription: In-progress, successful, and failed states are saved to your account and remain visible after refresh or sign-in.
jd.imageHistoryEmpty: Upload an image to see its extraction status and result here.
jd.parsingPersistent: Vision is reading the image. You can keep this page open for long requests; the status refreshes automatically.
jd.failurePersisted: The failed record and request ID were saved below.
jd.imageRetryHint: Select and upload the same image again to retry the failed record without creating a duplicate JD.
jd.duplicateFound: Identical content found; the existing JD was reused
jd.emptyDescription: Paste a job description to begin.
jd.extracted: JD requirements extracted; review them before confirmation
jd.reviewDescription: Correct role metadata and requirements. Only confirmed JDs can enter fact matching and targeted resume workflows.
jd.confirmed: JD confirmed and ready for matching

targeted.title: Generate a Targeted Resume from JD + Facts
targeted.description: JadeAI combines confirmed job requirements with approved career facts and creates reviewable changes. It never overwrites a resume directly.
targeted.confirmedNotice: This JD has {count} confirmed requirements. Only these requirements and approved facts from your account may be referenced.
targeted.knowledgeOnlyNotice: Create an independent empty targeted resume, then populate it only from approved facts.
targeted.baseCopyNotice: Copy the selected resume and propose changes only on the independent copy; the original and its versions remain unchanged.
targeted.instructionPlaceholder: For example: emphasize client performance optimization and shipped projects; keep it to one page. Do not request invented experience.
targeted.reviewNotice: The result first enters Change Set diff review. Verify each claim and its evidence before applying it, then export PDF or Word.
targeted.generating: Matching the JD to approved facts and generating a proposal…
targeted.generatingNotice: Large knowledge bases and JDs may take a while. Do not submit the request twice.
targeted.successNotice: {count} reviewable changes were generated. Open the resume to select which ones to apply.

errors.NO_APPROVED_FACTS: There are no approved career facts yet. Review and approve facts first.
errors.JD_SOURCE_NOT_CONFIRMED: This JD is not confirmed or was edited again. Review and confirm it first.
errors.BASE_RESUME_NOT_FOUND: The selected base resume does not exist or belongs to another account.
errors.LLM_PROFILE_REQUIRED: No LLM profile is bound to Resume. Select a tested profile in Settings.
errors.LLM_PROFILE_INVALID: The Resume LLM profile failed its latest test. Re-test it or select another profile in Settings.
errors.LLM_RESUME_TIMEOUT: The resume model did not finish in time. Shorten the extra instruction or select a faster model and retry.
errors.INVALID_MODEL_OUTPUT: The model did not return reviewable structured resume changes. Retry or select another model.
errors.default: Targeted resume generation failed. Check the Resume LLM profile and retry.

match.title: JD–Fact Match Matrix
match.description: Deterministically match confirmed JD requirements against approved career facts and surface strong, partial, gap, and conflict rows.
match.descriptionWithTitle: Analyze matches between “{title}” and approved facts.
match.hint: Use the matrix to inspect evidence coverage before generating a targeted resume. Targeted generation also consumes this matrix automatically.
match.empty: Click “Run match” to generate the matrix.
match.gapHint: Gap and conflict items must not be claimed as satisfied. Targeted generation prioritizes strong and partial evidence.

errors.NO_APPROVED_FACTS: No approved career facts yet. Review facts first.
errors.JD_SOURCE_NOT_CONFIRMED: This JD is not confirmed yet. Review and confirm first.
errors.default: Match analysis failed. Please try again.

knowledge.title: Career Knowledge
knowledge.description: Review facts, evidence, and claims extracted from personal information repositories. Only approved facts enter AI resume context; forbidden claims always block exaggeration.
knowledge.reviewQueueDescription: {count} facts are awaiting review. Select several to approve or reject them together.
knowledge.reviewQueueEmpty: No facts are awaiting review. Approved facts are ready for resume generation.
knowledge.stableReviewHint: Approved or rejected rows stay in place until you explicitly reapply filters, so the list does not jump during review.
knowledge.workbenchDescription: Review facts in one compact scrolling table. The list stays stable while the detail pane shows full evidence, claims, and structured data. Filter atomic skills by type and review them in batches.
knowledge.searchPlaceholder: Search title, summary, or canonical key…
knowledge.filterEmptyDescription: Change the search query, review status, or fact type.
knowledge.emptyDescription: Upload a WorkResume v2 directory above first. Imported facts remain in review until approved for use in AI resume context.
knowledge.emptyHint: The local import command remains available, and the optional GitHub connection can be enabled when needed.
knowledge.factApproved: Fact approved and available to AI
knowledge.newDraftCreated: A new draft version was created; the reviewed version remains unchanged
knowledge.mergeDraftCreated: Merge draft created; review it before use
knowledge.editDraftDescription: The draft is updated in place and the review event is retained.
knowledge.editVersionDescription: Editing a reviewed fact creates a new draft. The old version is superseded only after approval.
knowledge.invalidStructuredData: Structured data must be a valid JSON object
knowledge.mergeDescription: Create a reviewable draft from {count} facts with deduplicated evidence and claims. Source facts are superseded only after approval.

upload.title: Upload personal information source
upload.description: Select a WorkResume v2 directory containing WorkResume.config.json without configuring a GitHub App. Re-uploads check content hashes and retain immutable revisions.
upload.securityNote: The server accepts only bounded text formats and validates paths, size, UTF-8, suspected secrets, and prompt injection. Files are never executed or sent to an LLM; rejected content does not enter the knowledge base.
upload.selectedFiles: Selected {count} files. Click Secure import to parse them.
upload.empty: No personal information source uploaded yet. Select the complete WorkResume v2 directory.
upload.requestFailed: Failed to load upload source status
upload.alreadyImported: Content is unchanged; no duplicate import was created
upload.importSummary: Checked {files} files and identified {facts} career facts.

publicGithub.title: Import public GitHub repository
publicGithub.description: Paste a public repository URL to import WorkResume v2 content. Rechecking resolves the current default-branch commit and imports only a new immutable revision.
publicGithub.securityNote: Only canonical github.com repository URLs are accepted. The server calls the fixed GitHub API origin without credentials, rejects redirects, and applies the same path, size, secret, and prompt-injection controls as directory upload.
publicGithub.empty: No public GitHub personal information repository imported yet.
publicGithub.requestFailed: Failed to load public GitHub sources
publicGithub.alreadyImported: The default branch is unchanged; no duplicate import was created
publicGithub.importSummary: Fetched {blobs} changed files and identified {facts} career facts.

githubPat.title: Connect a private GitHub repository with a fine-grained token
githubPat.description: Use a GitHub fine-grained personal access token when a repository is private and you do not want to configure a GitHub App. Select repositories after the token is verified, then run incremental sync on demand or by the scheduler.
githubPat.label: Connection label (optional)
githubPat.securityNote: Only tokens beginning with github_pat_ are accepted. Grant repository access only to the required repositories with Metadata and Contents read permissions. The token is encrypted with AES-GCM on the server, bound to this user and connection, never returned by the API, and deleted when the connection is revoked.
githubPat.empty: No fine-grained GitHub token connection yet. Public repositories can continue using the credential-free importer above.
githubPat.revokeConfirm: Revoke {account}? The encrypted token will be deleted and its repositories will stop syncing.
githubPat.selectionSaved: Repository selection saved. Run the initial sync for newly selected repositories.
githubPat.repositoryDialogDescription: Only selected repositories are synchronized. The token must have Metadata read and Contents read permission for each repository.
githubPat.noAccessibleRepositories: No repositories are accessible to this token. Review its resource owner, repository access, expiration, and read permissions on GitHub.

github.title: GitHub App advanced connection (optional)
github.description: When background synchronization or webhook updates are needed, authorize a read-only GitHub App and select private or public repositories. File upload does not depend on this feature.
github.securityNote: Only read-only Metadata and Contents permissions are requested. Short-lived installation tokens stay within one request and are never stored; suspected secrets and prompt injection content cannot enter AI context.
github.empty: GitHub is not connected yet. After authorization, select repositories without entering a personal access token in JadeAI.
github.selectionSaved: Repository selection saved. Run the initial sync for newly selected repositories.
github.repositoryDialogDescription: Only selected repositories are synchronized. Updates can be imported incrementally by a manual check or GitHub webhook.
github.noAccessibleRepositories: No repositories are accessible to this GitHub App installation. Adjust its repository access on GitHub and try again.
